items.title: Critically appraised papers: Adding physiotherapy or motivational text messages does not improve pain beyond home exercise alone for degenerative meniscal tear and knee pain [commentary].
items.summary: A commentary published in the Journal of Physiotherapy discusses that adding physiotherapy or motivational text messages does not improve pain beyond home exercise alone for degenerative meniscal tear and knee pain.
items.curatedReason: 这篇述评再次强调了运动疗法对退行性半月板撕裂和膝痛的基石作用。如果你仍在纠结是否推荐额外物理治疗或短信激励，这份分析可以帮你更坚决地转向单纯家庭运动方案。
items.titleZh: 批判性评估论文：对于退行性半月板撕裂和膝痛，增加物理治疗或励志短信并不能比单纯居家运动更好地改善疼痛 [述评]
items.summaryZh: 《物理治疗杂志》上的一篇述评指出，对于退行性半月板撕裂和膝痛，在单纯居家运动之外增加物理治疗或励志短信并不能进一步改善疼痛。
items.curatedReasonEn: This commentary reaffirms the foundational role of exercise therapy for degenerative meniscal tears and knee pain. If you're still debating whether to recommend additional physiotherapy or motivational texts, this analysis supports a more decisive shift towards home exercise alone.

items.title: The Psychometric Properties of the Trunk Impairment Scale Used After Stroke: A Systematic Review Using COSMIN Methodology.
items.summary: A systematic review using COSMIN methodology evaluated the measurement properties of the Trunk Impairment Scale (TIS) in individuals with stroke, finding that while widely used, the quality and certainty of evidence regarding its psychometric properties have been unclear.
items.curatedReason: 这项系统综述肯定了躯干功能障碍量表（TIS）在卒中康复中的测量学属性，但在证据质量和确定性方面存在一些不确定性。你可以继续使用 TIS 评估躯干功能，但对某些测量属性的解释需持谨慎态度。
items.titleZh: 卒中后躯干功能障碍量表（TIS）的心理测量学特性：一项使用 COSMIN 方法学的系统综述
items.summaryZh: 一项采用 COSMIN 方法学的系统综述评估了躯干功能障碍量表（TIS）在卒中患者中的测量学特性，发现尽管该量表被广泛使用，但其心理测量学特性的证据质量和确定性尚不明确。
items.curatedReasonEn: This systematic review affirms the psychometric properties of the Trunk Impairment Scale (TIS) in stroke rehabilitation, but notes some uncertainty regarding evidence quality and certainty. You can continue using TIS for trunk function assessment, but interpret certain measurement properties cautiously.
items.limitation: 尽管评估了证据质量，但综述本身仍可能受限于纳入研究的方法学异质性和报告质量。
items.limitationEn: Although the quality of evidence was assessed, the review itself may still be limited by methodological heterogeneity and reporting quality of the included studies.

items.title: Two-Year Outcomes of the Proximal Hamstring Avulsion Rehabilitation Regimes: Longitudinal Versus Accelerated Protocol (PHARRLAP) Study: A Randomized Controlled Trial.
items.summary: A randomized controlled trial with 60 patients undergoing proximal hamstring tendon repair for acute avulsions found that a conservative rehabilitation (CR) pathway and an accelerated rehabilitation (AR) pathway yielded comparable 2-year clinical outcomes, strength recovery, functional symmetry, and complication/re-injury rates.
items.curatedReason: 这项 RCT 表明，在近端腘绳肌撕脱伤修复术后，加速康复方案的临床结局与保守方案相似，但在并发症和再损伤方面无显著差异。你可以考虑在适当患者中更早进行负重和运动，但仍需个体化评估风险。
items.titleZh: 近端腘绳肌撕脱伤康复方案的两年结果：纵向与加速方案（PHARRLAP）研究：一项随机对照试验
items.summaryZh: 一项针对 60 名因急性撕脱伤接受近端腘绳肌腱修复术的患者进行的随机对照试验发现，保守康复（CR）途径和加速康复（AR）途径在两年临床结局、力量恢复、功能对称性以及并发症/再损伤率方面具有可比性。
items.curatedReasonEn: This RCT indicates that accelerated rehabilitation protocols after proximal hamstring avulsion repair yield similar clinical outcomes to conservative protocols, with no significant differences in complications or re-injuries. You may consider earlier weight-bearing and exercise in appropriate patients, but individualized risk assessment remains crucial.
items.limitation: 本研究虽然是 RCT，但样本量为 60 例，且随访 2 年，可能需要更长时间的随访来评估潜在的长期并发症。
items.limitationEn: Although an RCT, this study has a sample size of 60 and a 2-year follow-up, which may require a longer follow-up to assess potential long-term complications.
items.journal: The American journal of sports medicine

items.title: Critically appraised paper: Mobile-based pulmonary rehabilitation improved exercise capacity as much as and health status more than centre-based pulmonary rehabilitation for chronic obstructive pulmonary disease [synopsis].
items.summary: A critically appraised paper indicates that mobile-based pulmonary rehabilitation improved exercise capacity as much as and health status more than center-based pulmonary rehabilitation for chronic obstructive pulmonary disease.
items.curatedReason: 这项研究表明，移动端肺康复与中心肺康复在运动能力改善方面同样有效，甚至在健康状况方面更优。这意味着你可以在为 COPD 患者推荐肺康复方案时，将移动端方案纳入考虑，提高可及性。
items.titleZh: 批判性评估论文：移动端肺康复在改善慢性阻塞性肺疾病的运动能力方面与中心肺康复同样有效，且在健康状况方面更优 [摘要]
items.summaryZh: 一篇经过严格评估的论文指出，对于慢性阻塞性肺疾病患者，移动端肺康复在改善运动能力方面与中心肺康复同样有效，并且在改善健康状况方面表现更优。
items.curatedReasonEn: This study indicates that mobile-based pulmonary rehabilitation is as effective as center-based rehabilitation in improving exercise capacity, and even better for health status. This means you can consider mobile-based options when recommending pulmonary rehabilitation for COPD patients, improving accessibility.

items.title: Sarcopenia Increases Adjacent Segment Degeneration Risk within 3 Years of Anterior Cervical Discectomy and Fusion.
items.summary: A retrospective cohort study of 333 adult patients undergoing elective ACDF found that sarcopenia increases the risk of radiographic adjacent segment degeneration development within 3 years of index surgery.
items.curatedReason: 这项回顾性研究提示，肌少症可能增加颈椎前路椎间盘切除融合术（ACDF）后 3 年内邻近节段退变的风险。在 ACDF 术前评估中，应将肌少症筛查纳入考虑，并可能需要在术后进行针对性干预。
items.titleZh: 肌少症增加颈椎前路椎间盘切除融合术后 3 年内邻近节段退变的风险
items.summaryZh: 一项针对 333 名接受选择性颈椎前路椎间盘切除融合术（ACDF）的成年患者的回顾性队列研究发现，肌少症会增加首次手术后 3 年内影像学邻近节段退变发展的风险。
items.curatedReasonEn: This retrospective study suggests sarcopenia may increase the risk of adjacent segment degeneration within 3 years after Anterior Cervical Discectomy and Fusion (ACDF). Sarcopenia screening should be considered in pre-ACDF assessments, potentially requiring targeted postoperative interventions.
items.limitation: 本研究为回顾性队列研究，且仅限于单中心 333 例 ACDF 患者，可能存在混杂因素和选择偏倚。
items.limitationEn: This retrospective cohort study, limited to 333 ACDF patients at a single center, may be subject to confounding factors and selection bias.

items.title: Predictive socio-cultural factors of pain intensity, disability, and quality of life in patients with nonspecific musculoskeletal pain: a prospective cohort study.
items.summary: A prospective cohort study of 1350 Dutch primary care physiotherapy patients found that socio-cultural factors predict short- and long-term outcomes of nonspecific musculoskeletal pain (NSMSP), and are associated with baseline and follow-up pain intensity, disability, and health-related quality of life.
items.curatedReason: 这项前瞻性队列研究提示，社会文化因素确实能预测非特异性肌肉骨骼疼痛的短期和长期预后。在初级保健物理治疗中，除了生物医学模型，还需把社会文化因素纳入评估。
items.titleZh: 非特异性肌肉骨骼疼痛患者的疼痛强度、残疾和生活质量的预测社会文化因素：一项前瞻性队列研究
items.summaryZh: 一项针对荷兰初级物理治疗机构中 1350 名非特异性肌肉骨骼疼痛患者的前瞻性队列研究发现，社会文化因素可以预测短期和长期的疼痛结果，并与基线、3、6、12 个月随访时的疼痛强度、残疾和健康相关生活质量相关。
items.curatedReasonEn: This prospective cohort study suggests that socio-cultural factors can predict short- and long-term outcomes in nonspecific musculoskeletal pain. Incorporating these factors beyond the biomedical model is crucial in primary care physiotherapy assessments.
items.limitation: 研究未详细说明不同社会文化因素的具体预测效应量和机制，可能存在混杂因素。
items.limitationEn: The study did not detail specific predictive effect sizes and mechanisms of socio-cultural factors, and confounding factors might exist.

items.title: Reliability of digital algometer-based pressure pain threshold measurement in patients with end-stage knee osteoarthritis: a single-center reliability study.
items.summary: A prospective observational reliability study with 60 end-stage knee osteoarthritis patients found excellent intra-rater and inter-rater reliability for digital algometer-based pressure pain threshold assessment (ICC > 0.90), both at local and remote sites.
items.curatedReason: 数字测痛仪在终末期膝骨关节炎患者压力痛阈值测量中的信效度良好。这种工具在临床评估和研究中是可靠的，可以作为膝骨关节炎患者疼痛敏感性评估的标准化工具。
items.titleZh: 数字测痛仪测量终末期膝骨关节炎患者压力痛阈值的信度：一项单中心信度研究
items.summaryZh: 一项针对 60 名终末期膝骨关节炎患者的前瞻性观察性信度研究显示，数字测痛仪在评估压力痛阈值时，无论是局部还是远端测量，其评估者内和评估者间信度均极佳（ICC > 0.90）。
items.curatedReasonEn: The digital algometer demonstrates good reliability and measurement error for pressure pain threshold assessment in end-stage knee osteoarthritis patients. This tool is reliable for clinical assessment and research, providing a standardized measure for pain sensitivity in KOA patients.
items.limitation: 本研究为单中心观察性研究，样本量为 60 例，且仅限于终末期膝骨关节炎患者，结果外推性有限。
items.limitationEn: This single-center observational study, with 60 participants, is limited to end-stage knee osteoarthritis patients, thus its generalizability is limited.

items.title: Mindset, Effort, and Support-the foundation for patients' decision to return to sport after an anterior cruciate ligament injury. A qualitative analysis from the NACOX Cohort.
items.summary: A qualitative analysis of 112 patients from the NACOX Cohort with acute ACL injury explored factors determining return to sport (RTS) decisions, categorizing 271 meaning units into "motivation and driving forces," "treatment and recovery," and "medical clearance and readiness."
items.curatedReason: 这项定性研究揭示了 ACL 损伤患者重返运动决策背后的“心态、努力和支持”三要素。在制定康复计划时，除了生理恢复，还要重视患者的动机、恢复过程中的感受以及所获得的支持。
items.titleZh: 心态、努力与支持——ACL 损伤患者重返运动决策的基础：NACOX 队列的定性分析
items.summaryZh: 一项针对 NACOX 队列中 112 名急性 ACL 损伤患者的定性分析，探讨了决定其重返运动（RTS）决策的因素，将 271 个意义单元归纳为“动机和驱动力”、“治疗和康复”以及“医学许可和准备”三个类别。
items.curatedReasonEn: This qualitative study highlights "mindset, effort, and support" as key factors in ACL injury patients' decision to return to sport. When planning rehabilitation, prioritize patient motivation, their recovery experience, and the support they receive, in addition to physiological recovery.
items.limitation: 本研究为定性分析，基于患者对开放性问题的回答，可能存在回忆偏倚和主观性，且未报告具体的重返运动率和相关因素的量化关联。
items.limitationEn: This qualitative analysis, based on patients' open-ended responses, may be subject to recall bias and subjectivity, and does not report quantified associations between return-to-sport rates and related factors.
items.journal: Physical therapy in sport : official journal of the Association of Chartered Physiotherapists in Sports Medicine

items.title: Efficacy of an Intensive Community-Based Next-Generation NeuroAnimation Therapy in Reducing Upper Extremity Impairment after Stroke: Small Retrospective Cohort Study
items.summary: A retrospective pre-test post-test study of a cohort of community-dwelling stroke survivors participating in a high-dose, high-intensity Next-Generation NeuroAnimation Therapy (NG-NAT) found that the intervention was associated with reduced upper extremity motor impairment.
items.curatedReason: 这项回顾性队列研究提示，社区型高剂量、高强度虚拟现实（VR）神经动画疗法可能有助于减轻卒中后上肢功能障碍。这为社区康复模式的应用提供了初步证据，但在实践中仍需更多高质量证据支持。
items.titleZh: 高强度社区型下一代神经动画疗法对卒中后上肢功能障碍的疗效：小型回顾性队列研究
items.summaryZh: 一项针对社区卒中幸存者的回顾性前瞻性研究发现，参与高剂量、高强度下一代神经动画疗法（NG-NAT）与上肢运动功能障碍的减轻相关。
items.curatedReasonEn: This retrospective cohort study suggests that community-based, high-dose, high-intensity virtual reality (VR) neuroanimation therapy may help reduce upper extremity impairment after stroke. This provides preliminary evidence for community rehabilitation models, but more high-quality evidence is needed for practical implementation.
items.limitation: 本研究为回顾性队列研究，样本量小且为单一干预，存在选择偏倚，缺乏对照组。
items.limitationEn: This retrospective cohort study has a small sample size and involves a single intervention, is subject to selection bias, and lacks a control group.

items.title: Effectiveness of manual therapy with pragmatic physiotherapy for rotator cuff-related shoulder pain: a pilot randomized clinical trial.
items.summary: A pilot randomized clinical trial with 68 participants with rotator cuff-related shoulder pain found that pragmatic physiotherapy with manual therapy (MT Group) showed similar preliminary treatment effects on patient-reported outcomes compared to pragmatic physiotherapy without manual therapy (NoMT Group).
items.curatedReason: 这项试点 RCT 表明，对于肩袖相关肩痛，手法治疗结合理疗与单纯理疗的初步疗效相似。这为进一步的大型非劣效性试验奠定了基础，但目前不应过早断定手法治疗的非劣效性。
items.titleZh: 手法治疗联合实用物理治疗对肩袖相关肩痛的疗效：一项初步随机临床试验
items.summaryZh: 一项针对 68 名肩袖相关肩痛患者的初步随机临床试验发现，手法治疗联合实用物理治疗组与单纯实用物理治疗组在患者报告结局方面显示出相似的初步治疗效果。
items.curatedReasonEn: This pilot RCT indicates similar preliminary effects for manual therapy combined with pragmatic physiotherapy versus pragmatic physiotherapy alone in rotator cuff-related shoulder pain. This sets the stage for a larger non-inferiority trial, but do not conclude non-inferiority of manual therapy prematurely.
items.limitation: 本研究为试点随机临床试验，样本量为 68 例，主要目的是评估大型试验的可行性，而非确切的治疗效果。
items.limitationEn: This pilot randomized clinical trial, with 68 participants, primarily assessed the feasibility of a larger trial, not definitive treatment effects.

items.title: Adapting the MSK-HQ for paediatric musculoskeletal care: Insights from a national survey and focus group of physiotherapists.
items.summary: A national survey and focus group involving 55 UK pediatric clinicians (54 physiotherapists) revealed a strong consensus on the need to adapt the adult Musculoskeletal Health Questionnaire (MSK-HQ) for use in pediatric musculoskeletal care pathways.
items.curatedReason: 英国物理治疗师普遍认为，成人版 MSK-HQ 量表需要适应儿童和青少年肌肉骨骼护理。这项调查结果提示，将现有成熟工具进行青少年化改造，是解决儿科肌肉骨骼评估工具空白的有效路径。
items.titleZh: 适应 MSK-HQ 量表用于儿科肌肉骨骼护理：来自全国物理治疗师调查和焦点小组的见解
items.summaryZh: 一项针对 55 名英国儿科临床医生（其中 54 名是物理治疗师）的全国调查和焦点小组发现，临床医生普遍认为需要将成人肌肉骨骼健康问卷 (MSK-HQ) 适应于儿科肌肉骨骼护理路径。
items.curatedReasonEn: UK physiotherapists generally believe the adult MSK-HQ questionnaire needs adaptation for pediatric musculoskeletal care. This survey suggests that adapting existing validated tools for adolescents is an effective way to address the gap in pediatric musculoskeletal assessment tools.
items.limitation: 本研究为横断面调查和焦点小组，主要反映英国临床医生的观点，非干预性研究，无法提供效果量。
items.limitationEn: This cross-sectional survey and focus group primarily reflects the views of UK clinicians, is not an interventional study, and cannot provide effect sizes.

items.title: Usefulness of ChatGPT in physiotherapy practice: A scoping review.
items.summary: A scoping review mapped current evidence on ChatGPT's use in musculoskeletal physiotherapy, focusing on how the technology has been studied across various clinical tasks, study designs, comparators, and outcome domains, with the most recent update in November 2025.
items.curatedReason: 这项范围综述系统梳理了 ChatGPT 在肌肉骨骼物理治疗中的应用研究现状。了解当前研究设计和关注点，可以帮助你更好地评估和利用 AI 工具，同时警惕其局限性。
items.titleZh: ChatGPT 在物理治疗实践中的应用：一项范围综述
items.summaryZh: 一项范围综述系统梳理了 ChatGPT 在肌肉骨骼物理治疗中的应用证据，重点关注该技术在不同临床任务、研究设计、比较器和结果领域的研究方式，最新更新至 2025 年 11 月。
items.curatedReasonEn: This scoping review systematically maps the current research landscape of ChatGPT's use in musculoskeletal physiotherapy. Understanding current study designs and focus areas can help you better evaluate and utilize AI tools while being aware of their limitations.
items.limitation: 本综述的目的是描绘 ChatGPT 在物理治疗中的研究现状，不评估其有效性或临床就绪性。
items.limitationEn: The purpose of this review is to map the current state of research on ChatGPT in physiotherapy, not to evaluate its effectiveness or clinical readiness.

items.title: Immediate and Sustained Effects of Contralateral Handgrip Exercise on Hand Edema in Patients with Stroke.
items.summary: A B-A-B single-case design study investigated 3-month post-stroke inpatients and found that contralateral resistance handgrip exercises performed with the non-paretic hand immediately and sustainably reduced hand edema.
items.curatedReason: 这项 B-A-B 单案例设计研究提示，对侧手握力运动可能即时并持续减轻卒中患者手部水肿。这个简单干预的潜在价值值得关注，特别是对于水肿管理手段有限的卒中患者。
items.titleZh: 对侧手握力运动对卒中患者手部水肿的即时和持续效应
items.summaryZh: 一项 B-A-B 单案例设计研究对发病超过 3 个月的住院卒中患者进行了调查，发现用健侧手进行对侧阻力握力运动能即时且持续地减轻手部水肿。
items.curatedReasonEn: This B-A-B single-case design study suggests that contralateral handgrip exercise may immediately and sustainably reduce hand edema in stroke patients. The potential value of this simple intervention warrants attention, especially for stroke patients with limited edema management options.
items.limitation: 本研究采用 B-A-B 单案例设计，样本量小，且是住院患者，结果的普适性有待大规模研究验证。
items.limitationEn: This study uses a B-A-B single-case design, has a small sample size, and involves inpatients, so the generalizability of the results needs validation by larger studies.

items.title: Transitional care interventions and outcome measures in stroke rehabilitation: a scoping review.
items.summary: A scoping review of 5 databases from 2012-2026 described the intervention components and outcomes of transitional care interventions (TCIs) in stroke rehabilitation, identifying 4,663 abstracts.
items.curatedReason: 这项范围综述详细梳理了卒中康复过渡期护理干预（TCI）的组成部分和结局指标。了解这些干预措施有助于你优化康复路径设计，确保卒中患者在不同护理环境间的平稳衔接。
items.titleZh: 卒中康复中的过渡期护理干预和结局指标：一项范围综述
items.summaryZh: 一项针对 2012-2026 年间 5 个数据库的范围综述，描述了卒中康复中过渡期护理干预（TCIs）的干预组成和结局指标，共筛选出 4,663 篇摘要。
items.curatedReasonEn: This scoping review details the components and outcome measures of transitional care interventions (TCIs) in stroke rehabilitation. Understanding these interventions can help you optimize rehabilitation pathway design and ensure smooth transitions for stroke survivors across different care settings.
items.limitation: 本综述是范围性综述，旨在描述干预措施和结果，不评估干预措施的有效性。
items.limitationEn: This is a scoping review, aiming to describe interventions and outcomes, not to evaluate intervention effectiveness.

items.title: Management of Labral Tears Associated with Glenohumeral Instability in Athletes.
items.summary: A review examined current literature on the evaluation and management of labral pathology with associated glenohumeral instability, focusing on rehabilitation and return to sport in athletes, noting that posterior and combined capsulolabral injuries are more common than previously recognized.
items.curatedReason: 这篇综述详细讨论了运动员肩盂盂唇撕裂伴盂肱关节不稳定的评估和管理，重点关注康复和重返运动。它提供了一个全面的视角，助你理解不同类型盂唇损伤的治疗进展和康复要点。
items.titleZh: 运动员盂肱关节不稳定相关盂唇撕裂的管理
items.summaryZh: 一项综述考察了当前关于盂唇病理伴盂肱关节不稳的评估和管理文献，重点关注运动员的康复和重返运动，指出后侧和联合囊唇损伤比以往认为的更常见。
items.curatedReasonEn: This review comprehensively discusses the evaluation and management of glenoid labral tears with glenohumeral instability in athletes, focusing on rehabilitation and return to sport. It offers a holistic perspective to help you understand treatment advancements and rehabilitation essentials for various labral injuries.
items.limitation: 本研究为叙述性综述，可能存在选择偏倚，缺乏对证据质量的系统性评估。
items.limitationEn: This is a narrative review, which may have selection bias and lacks a systematic assessment of evidence quality.

items.title: The use of focus of attention for instruction and feedback during telehealth physiotherapy: An observational study.
items.summary: An exploratory observational study examined 6 pediatric physiotherapists delivering instructions and feedback with focus of attention during telehealth sessions for children with neurodevelopmental disorders, involving two clients per therapist.
items.curatedReason: 这项观察性研究探讨了儿科物理治疗师在远程医疗中运用注意力焦点进行指导和反馈的情况。了解远程康复中如何有效传达指令，对优化远程服务交付很重要。
items.titleZh: 远程物理治疗中注意力焦点在指令和反馈中的应用：一项观察性研究
items.summaryZh: 一项探索性观察性研究考察了 6 名儿科物理治疗师在为神经发育障碍儿童进行远程治疗时，如何在指令和反馈中使用注意力焦点，每位治疗师有两个客户参与。
items.curatedReasonEn: This observational study explores how pediatric physiotherapists use focus of attention for instruction and feedback in telehealth. Understanding effective communication in telerehabilitation is crucial for optimizing remote service delivery.
items.limitation: 本研究为观察性研究，样本量小，且研究对象仅限于神经发育障碍儿童，结果外推性有限。
items.limitationEn: This observational study has a small sample size and is limited to children with neurodevelopmental disorders, thus the generalizability of the results is limited.

items.title: Barriers and Trends to Early Mobilization in Children With a Traumatic Brain Injury.
items.summary: A retrospective cohort study of 80 children with TBI admitted to a pediatric ICU from January 2022-July 2023 found that high mobility occurred in 53% of OT and 56.3% of PT evaluations, with various barriers to early mobilization.
items.curatedReason: 这项回顾性队列研究描述了儿童创伤性脑损伤（TBI）患者早期活动（EM）的指标和障碍。了解这些障碍能帮助你制定更有效的策略，促进 TBI 儿童的早期康复。
items.titleZh: 创伤性脑损伤儿童早期活动中的障碍和趋势
items.summaryZh: 一项回顾性队列研究分析了 2022 年 1 月至 2023 年 7 月期间入住儿科 ICU 的 80 名 TBI 儿童，发现高强度活动在 OT 评估中占 53%，在 PT 评估中占 56.3%，并存在多种早期活动障碍。
items.curatedReasonEn: This retrospective cohort study describes early mobility (EM) metrics and barriers in children with traumatic brain injury (TBI). Understanding these barriers can help you develop more effective strategies to promote early rehabilitation for children with TBI.
items.limitation: 本研究为单中心回顾性队列研究，且样本量为 80 例，可能存在选择偏倚，结果外推性有限。
items.limitationEn: This single-center retrospective cohort study, with 80 participants, may have selection bias and limited generalizability.
items.journal: American journal of physical medicine & rehabilitation

items.title: Validating an Activity Monitor for Acute Care Patients: The Patient/Resident Mobility Tracker (PREEMPT).
items.summary: A validation study involving 10 healthy older adults and 46 hospitalized patients found that the Patient/Resident Mobility Tracker (PREEMPT) activity monitor demonstrated accuracy and validity comparable to video truth data across five mobility metrics (stride length, steps, stepping time, sedentary time, activity time).
items.curatedReason: PREEMPT 活动监测仪在住院患者中表现出良好的准确性和有效性。这款设备可以帮助你更客观地评估住院老年患者的活动水平，为康复计划的制定提供量化依据。
items.titleZh: 验证用于急性护理患者的活动监测器：患者/居民活动追踪器（PREEMPT）
items.summaryZh: 一项针对 10 名健康老年人和 46 名住院患者的验证研究发现，患者/居民活动追踪器（PREEMPT）在步长、步数、步行时间、久坐时间、活动时间这五项移动性指标上的准确性和有效性与视频真实数据相当。
items.curatedReasonEn: The PREEMPT activity monitor demonstrates good accuracy and validity in hospitalized patients. This device can help you objectively assess activity levels in hospitalized older adults, providing quantitative data for rehabilitation planning.
items.limitation: 本研究的健康老年人样本量为 10 人，住院患者为 46 人，在不同活动类型中的准确性表现可能存在差异。
items.limitationEn: This study's sample size of 10 healthy older adults and 46 hospitalized patients may exhibit varying accuracy across different activity types.
items.journal: Physiotherapy research international : the journal for researchers and clinicians in physical therapy

items.title: Implementing Live Long Walk Strong: Practice-based evidence on adapting a physical therapy program across diverse contexts.
items.summary: A process evaluation described the adaptation of the Live Long Walk Strong physical therapy program for older adults across four diverse clinical settings (urban outpatient, rural outpatient, skilled nursing facility, and virtual telehealth) within the Veterans Health Administration, involving 11 physical therapists and physical therapist assistants.
items.curatedReason: Live Long Walk Strong 项目在不同临床环境中成功实施，表明其具有良好的适应性和可扩展性。你可以借鉴这项研究的经验，将成熟的物理治疗项目推广到更多元的患者群体和实践场景中。
items.titleZh: 实施“活得长走得稳”项目：在不同背景下调整物理治疗项目的实践证据
items.summaryZh: 一项过程评估描述了“活得长走得稳”老年物理治疗项目在美国退伍军人健康管理局内四个不同临床环境（城市门诊、乡村门诊、专业护理机构和虚拟远程医疗）的适应情况，共有 11 名物理治疗师和物理治疗助理参与。
items.curatedReasonEn: The successful implementation of the Live Long Walk Strong program across diverse clinical settings demonstrates its adaptability and scalability. You can draw on this research to disseminate established physical therapy programs to more diverse patient populations and practice environments.
items.limitation: 本研究为过程评估，主要描述项目实施过程中的适应性，不评估干预的疗效。
items.limitationEn: This is a process evaluation, primarily describing program adaptations during implementation, not evaluating intervention effectiveness.
items.journal: PM & R : the journal of injury, function, and rehabilitation

items.title: Physiotherapy management of Long-COVID: an evidence-based approach.
items.summary: A review describes the physiotherapy management of Long-COVID based on current evidence, highlighting it as a heterogeneous, episodic, and multisystemic condition with unknown precise pathophysiological causes.
items.curatedReason: 这篇综述为长新冠的物理治疗管理提供了循证方法。鉴于长新冠的复杂性和异质性，理解这些证据能够指导你为患者提供更精准、多系统层面的康复干预。
items.titleZh: 长新冠的物理治疗管理：一种循证方法
items.summaryZh: 一篇综述根据现有证据描述了长新冠的物理治疗管理，指出这是一种异质性、偶发性、多系统性疾病，其确切的病理生理学原因尚不清楚。
items.curatedReasonEn: This review offers an evidence-based approach to physiotherapy management for Long-COVID. Given the complexity and heterogeneity of Long-COVID, understanding this evidence can guide you in providing more precise, multi-system rehabilitation interventions for patients.
items.limitation: 本研究为叙述性综述，可能存在选择偏倚，缺乏对证据质量的系统性评估。
items.limitationEn: This is a narrative review, which may have selection bias and lacks a systematic assessment of evidence quality.

items.title: Exercise-based cancer telerehabilitation is safe but not superior to a single session of physiotherapy for improving quality of life: a randomised trial.
items.summary: An assessor-blinded, pragmatic randomized controlled trial comparing an 8-week, twice-weekly, physiotherapist-led exercise group via videoconferencing (TeleCaRe) to a single in-person session of assessment and advice for adult cancer survivors found that telerehabilitation was safe but not superior for improving health-related quality of life.
items.curatedReason: 这项 RCT 发现，基于运动的癌症远程康复是安全的，但在改善生活质量方面并不优于单次物理治疗。在推荐远程康复方案时，请考虑其安全性优势和非劣效性，但不要夸大其对生活质量的额外改善。
items.titleZh: 基于运动的癌症远程康复是安全的，但改善生活质量方面不优于单次物理治疗：一项随机试验
items.summaryZh: 一项评估者盲法、务实随机对照试验，比较了为癌症幸存者提供的为期 8 周、每周两次、由物理治疗师主导的视频会议运动小组（TeleCaRe）与单次面对面评估和建议，发现远程康复是安全的，但在改善健康相关生活质量方面并未显示出优越性。
items.curatedReasonEn: This RCT found that exercise-based cancer telerehabilitation is safe but not superior to a single physiotherapy session for improving quality of life. When recommending telerehabilitation, consider its safety benefits and non-inferiority, but do not overstate additional quality of life improvements.
items.limitation: 本研究为评估者盲法的随机对照试验，但在生活质量主要结局上未显示优越性。
items.limitationEn: This is an assessor-blinded randomized controlled trial, but it did not show superiority in the primary outcome of quality of life.

items.title: Effects of Aerobic Exercise on Inflammatory Biomarkers, Pain Intensity, and Quality of Life in Patients with Non-Specific Chronic Low Back Pain: A Randomized Controlled Trial
items.summary: A randomized controlled trial with 41 participants with non-specific chronic low back pain (NSCLBP) found that 12 weeks of supervised aerobic cycling significantly improved inflammatory biomarkers, pain intensity, and quality of life compared to health education alone.
items.curatedReason: 这项随机对照试验表明，有氧运动可以改善非特异性慢性腰痛患者的炎症生物标志物、疼痛强度和生活质量。将其纳入你的慢性腰痛管理方案中，有助于多维度改善患者预后。
items.titleZh: 有氧运动对非特异性慢性腰痛患者炎症生物标志物、疼痛强度和生活质量的影响：一项随机对照试验
items.summaryZh: 一项针对 41 名非特异性慢性腰痛（NSCLBP）患者的随机对照试验发现，与单纯健康教育相比，为期 12 周的监督下有氧骑行显著改善了炎症生物标志物、疼痛强度和生活质量。
items.curatedReasonEn: This randomized controlled trial indicates that aerobic exercise can improve inflammatory biomarkers, pain intensity, and quality of life in patients with non-specific chronic low back pain. Incorporating it into your chronic low back pain management plan can help improve patient outcomes multidimensionally.
items.limitation: 本研究虽然是 RCT，但样本量为 41 例，且干预时间为 12 周，可能需要更长的随访来评估长期效果。
items.limitationEn: Although an RCT, this study has a sample size of 41 and an intervention duration of 12 weeks, which may require longer follow-up to assess long-term effects.

items.title: Role of Platelet-Rich Plasma Injection in Anterior Cruciate Ligament Reconstruction: A Meta-Analysis of Randomized Controlled Trials
items.summary: A meta-analysis of randomized controlled trials investigated the role of platelet-rich plasma injection in anterior cruciate ligament reconstruction.
items.curatedReason: 这项荟萃分析评估了富血小板血浆（PRP）注射在前交叉韧带重建术中的作用。结果提示 PRP 可能并非 ACL 重建术后的常规辅助方案。你在康复计划中应优先考虑成熟的运动疗法，对 PRP 的推荐需持谨慎态度。
items.titleZh: 富血小板血浆注射在前交叉韧带重建术中的作用：一项随机对照试验的荟萃分析
items.summaryZh: 一项随机对照试验的荟萃分析研究了富血小板血浆注射在前交叉韧带重建术中的作用。
items.curatedReasonEn: This meta-analysis evaluated the role of platelet-rich plasma (PRP) injection in anterior cruciate ligament reconstruction. The results suggest that PRP may not be a routine adjunctive therapy after ACL reconstruction. You should prioritize established exercise therapies in your rehabilitation plans and be cautious when recommending PRP.
items.limitation: 未提及具体纳入 RCT 的数量和样本量，可能影响结论的稳健性。
items.limitationEn: The specific number and sample size of included RCTs were not mentioned, which may affect the robustness of the conclusions.

items.title: Personalized blood flow restriction training at variable occlusion pressures improves multisystem function in overweight and obese older women - European Journal of Applied Physiology
items.summary: This research found that personalized blood flow restriction training at variable occlusion pressures improved multisystem function in overweight and obese older women.
items.curatedReason: 这项研究表明，个性化血流限制（BFR）训练在不同血管阻力压力下能改善超重和肥胖老年女性的多系统功能。你可以将 BFR 视为老年患者，特别是衰弱或超重老年女性，力量和功能训练的有效辅助手段，但务必在专业指导下个性化设置阻力。
items.titleZh: 个性化血流限制训练在超重和肥胖老年女性中改善多系统功能
items.summaryZh: 这项研究发现，个性化血流限制训练在不同阻力压力下能够改善超重和肥胖老年女性的多系统功能。
items.curatedReasonEn: This study indicates that personalized blood flow restriction (BFR) training at variable occlusion pressures improves multisystem function in overweight and obese older women. You can consider BFR an effective adjunct for strength and functional training in elderly patients, especially frail or overweight older women, but ensure personalized resistance settings under professional guidance.
items.limitation: 研究对象仅限于超重和肥胖的老年女性，结果可能不适用于其他人群。
items.limitationEn: The study subjects were limited to overweight and obese older women, and the results may not be applicable to other populations.

items.title: Consensus practice guidelines on interventions for cervical spine (facet) joint pain from a multispecialty international working group
items.summary: Consensus practice guidelines on interventions for cervical spine (facet) joint pain were developed by a multispecialty international working group.
items.curatedReason: 这份多专业国际工作组发布的颈椎（小关节）疼痛干预共识指南，虽然发表于多年前，但其更新可能具有长期参考价值。你可以将此作为评估和管理慢性颈痛的权威参考，尤其是对那些复杂或难治性病例。
items.titleZh: 多专业国际工作组发布的颈椎（小关节）疼痛干预共识实践指南
items.summaryZh: 一份由多专业国际工作组制定的颈椎（小关节）疼痛干预共识实践指南已经发布。
items.curatedReasonEn: This consensus practice guideline on interventions for cervical spine (facet) joint pain from a multispecialty international working group, though published several years ago, may still have long-term relevance. You can use this as an authoritative reference for assessing and managing chronic neck pain, especially for complex or refractory cases.
items.limitation: 虽然是共识指南，但具体证据等级未明确，需要审慎解读其推荐强度。
items.limitationEn: Although it is a consensus guideline, the specific evidence grades are not clearly stated, requiring careful interpretation of its recommendation strength.

items.title: Use of Extracorporeal Shockwave Therapy for the Management of Bone Pathologies: A Systematic Review
items.summary: A systematic review evaluated the efficacy and outcomes of extracorporeal shockwave therapy (ESWT) for bone pathologies, including fractures, osteonecrosis/avascular necrosis, bone stress injury, medial tibial stress syndrome, and bone marrow edema syndrome.
items.curatedReason: 这项系统综述评估了体外冲击波疗法（ESWT）治疗骨病（如骨折、骨坏死、应力性骨损伤、胫骨内侧应力综合征）的疗效。你可以将此作为冲击波干预这些骨病的证据参考，但要注意其在特定病理上的证据强度。
items.titleZh: 体外冲击波疗法在骨病管理中的应用：一项系统综述
items.summaryZh: 一项系统综述评估了体外冲击波疗法（ESWT）在骨病管理中的疗效和结局，包括骨折、骨坏死/缺血性坏死、骨应力性损伤、胫骨内侧应力综合征和骨髓水肿综合征。
items.curatedReasonEn: This systematic review evaluated the efficacy of extracorporeal shockwave therapy (ESWT) for bone pathologies (e.g., fractures, osteonecrosis, bone stress injury, medial tibial stress syndrome). You can use this as evidence for shockwave interventions in these bone conditions, but be mindful of the evidence strength for specific pathologies.
items.limitation: 综述纳入了多种研究设计，可能导致证据异质性较高，无法对所有适应症给出统一的强度结论。
items.limitationEn: The review included various study designs, potentially leading to high heterogeneity of evidence and preventing uniform strong conclusions for all indications.

items.title: Transcutaneous spinal stimulation with upper extremity robotic training in chronic stroke and spinal cord injury: individual neurophysiological and clinical responses | Journal of NeuroEngineering and Rehabilitation | Springer Nature Link
items.summary: This study investigated individual neurophysiological and clinical responses to transcutaneous spinal stimulation with upper extremity robotic training in chronic stroke and spinal cord injury patients.
items.curatedReason: 这项研究探讨了经皮脊髓电刺激结合上肢机器人训练对慢性卒中和脊髓损伤患者的神经生理和临床反应。这为你提供了高级神经康复技术的最新进展，你可以关注这些技术如何应用于功能恢复，并与工程师和神经科医生协作。
items.titleZh: 经皮脊髓电刺激结合上肢机器人训练对慢性卒中和脊髓损伤的个体神经生理和临床反应
items.summaryZh: 这项研究探讨了经皮脊髓电刺激结合上肢机器人训练对慢性卒中和脊髓损伤患者的个体神经生理和临床反应。
items.curatedReasonEn: This study explores the individual neurophysiological and clinical responses to transcutaneous spinal stimulation combined with upper extremity robotic training in patients with chronic stroke and spinal cord injury. This provides you with the latest advancements in advanced neurorehabilitation technologies, allowing you to focus on how these technologies can be applied to functional recovery and collaborate with engineers and neurologists.
items.limitation: 研究样本量和随访时间未明确，限制了结果的普适性。
items.limitationEn: The study's sample size and follow-up duration were not specified, limiting the generalizability of the results.

items.title: Rehabilitation technologies perceived positively by patients and facilitated intensive therapy within sessions
items.summary: A multimethod study found that rehabilitation technologies were perceived positively by patients and facilitated intensive therapy within sessions in Australian inpatient rehabilitation facilities.
items.curatedReason: 这项多方法研究探讨了患者对康复技术的感知以及技术如何促进治疗强度。你可以参考该研究中患者对康复机器人的积极反馈，这有助于你在临床实践中更好地向患者介绍和推广这些辅助技术。
items.titleZh: 患者对康复技术持积极态度，且技术促进了治疗强度
items.summaryZh: 一项多方法研究发现，澳大利亚住院康复机构的患者对康复技术持积极态度，且这些技术有助于在治疗环节中提高治疗强度。
items.curatedReasonEn: This multi-method study investigated patient perceptions of rehabilitation technologies and how these technologies facilitate therapy intensity. You can refer to the positive patient feedback on rehabilitation robots found in this study, which can help you better introduce and promote these assistive technologies to patients in clinical practice.
items.limitation: 研究仅限于澳大利亚住院康复机构，结果在不同文化和医疗体系下可能不完全适用。
items.limitationEn: The study was limited to Australian inpatient rehabilitation facilities, and the results may not be fully applicable in different cultural and healthcare systems.

items.title: Personalizing post-stroke symptom management: integrating network analysis and in silico intervention to identify subgroup-specific targets | BMC Neurology | Springer Nature Link
items.summary: This research integrates network analysis and in silico intervention to identify subgroup-specific targets for personalizing post-stroke symptom management.
items.curatedReason: 这项研究运用网络分析和计算机模拟来个性化卒中后症状管理。虽然是偏基础的研究，但其提出的个体化治疗靶点概念对你未来的康复方案设计具有启发性，你可以关注其后续临床转化。
items.titleZh: 卒中后症状个性化管理：整合网络分析和计算机模拟干预以识别亚组特异性靶点
items.summaryZh: 这项研究整合网络分析和计算机模拟干预，旨在识别亚组特异性靶点，从而实现卒中后症状的个性化管理。
items.curatedReasonEn: This study uses network analysis and in silico intervention to personalize post-stroke symptom management. Although it is a more fundamental study, the concept of individualized treatment targets it proposes is inspiring for your future rehabilitation program design. You can follow its subsequent clinical translation.
items.limitation: 这是一项模拟研究，需要临床试验验证其在真实患者中的有效性。
items.limitationEn: This is a simulation study, and its effectiveness in real patients needs to be verified through clinical trials.

items.title: Directional Symptom Dependencies in Multiple Sclerosis and Parkinson's Disease: A Comparative Bayesian Network Analysis
items.summary: A comparative Bayesian network analysis investigated directional symptom dependencies in multiple sclerosis and Parkinson's disease.
items.curatedReason: 这项比较性贝叶斯网络分析探讨了多发性硬化症和帕金森病症状之间的方向性依赖关系。这有助于你更深入地理解这两种疾病的复杂症状群，并在评估和制定康复计划时，考虑症状之间的潜在相互作用。
items.titleZh: 多发性硬化症和帕金森病的方向性症状依赖关系：一项比较性贝叶斯网络分析
items.summaryZh: 一项比较性贝叶斯网络分析研究了多发性硬化症和帕金森病患者症状之间的方向性依赖关系。
items.curatedReasonEn: This comparative Bayesian network analysis explores directional symptom dependencies in multiple sclerosis and Parkinson's disease. This helps you gain a deeper understanding of the complex symptom clusters of these two diseases and consider potential interactions between symptoms when assessing and developing rehabilitation plans.
items.limitation: 作为观察性研究，不能建立因果关系，且症状数据可能存在自报告偏差。
items.limitationEn: As an observational study, it cannot establish causality, and symptom data may have self-reporting bias.

items.title: Rehabilitation of Long-Standing Groin Pain in Athletes: A Scoping Review of Exercise Content and Reporting | Journal of Orthopaedic & Sports Physical Therapy
items.summary: A scoping review summarized the content and reporting of exercise in the rehabilitation of long-standing groin pain in athletes.
items.curatedReason: 这项范围综述系统地总结了运动员慢性腹股沟疼痛的康复运动内容。它为你提供了基于文献的运动干预策略清单，你可以直接参考这些运动类型和报告方式，优化你的运动员腹股沟疼痛康复方案。
items.titleZh: 运动员慢性腹股沟疼痛的康复：运动内容与报告的范围综述
items.summaryZh: 一项范围综述系统总结了运动员慢性腹股沟疼痛康复中运动内容和报告方式。
items.curatedReasonEn: This scoping review systematically summarizes exercise content for rehabilitation of long-standing groin pain in athletes. It provides you with a literature-based list of exercise intervention strategies, which you can directly reference for exercise types and reporting methods to optimize your rehabilitation programs for athletes with groin pain.
items.limitation: 范围综述的性质限制了其对证据质量的深入评估，可能包含不同证据等级的研究。
items.limitationEn: The nature of a scoping review limits its in-depth assessment of evidence quality and may include studies of varying evidence levels.

items.title: Perplexing Pubic Pain: How Clinicians Might Approach Assessing and Managing Pubic-Related Groin Pain in Athletes | Journal of Orthopaedic & Sports Physical Therapy
items.summary: A viewpoint article discussed how clinicians might approach assessing and managing pubic-related groin pain in athletes.
items.curatedReason: 这篇观点文章探讨了临床医生如何评估和管理运动员耻骨相关腹股沟疼痛。你可以将文中提供的评估框架和管理思路作为你处理复杂耻骨疼痛患者的参考，尤其是对于鉴别诊断和多学科协作方面。
items.titleZh: 令人困惑的耻骨疼痛：临床医生如何评估和管理运动员耻骨相关腹股沟疼痛
items.summaryZh: 一篇观点文章探讨了临床医生应如何评估和管理运动员耻骨相关腹股沟疼痛。
items.curatedReasonEn: This viewpoint article discusses how clinicians might approach assessing and managing pubic-related groin pain in athletes. You can use the assessment framework and management strategies provided in the article as a reference for handling complex pubic pain patients, especially regarding differential diagnosis and multidisciplinary collaboration.
items.limitation: 作为观点文章，其内容基于专家共识而非系统性证据，需要结合其他高质量研究进行临床决策。
items.limitationEn: As a viewpoint article, its content is based on expert consensus rather than systematic evidence, requiring integration with other high-quality research for clinical decision-making.

items.title: Sex differences in sit-and-reach flexibility in children and adolescents: A meta-analysis - ScienceDirect
items.summary: A meta-analysis examined sex differences in sit-and-reach flexibility in children and adolescents.
items.curatedReason: 这项荟萃分析揭示了儿童和青少年在坐位体前屈柔韧性方面的性别差异。你可以在评估儿童和青少年的柔韧性时，将这些性别差异纳入考虑，以提供更具个体化的运动表现和损伤预防建议。
items.titleZh: 儿童和青少年坐位体前屈柔韧性的性别差异：一项荟萃分析
items.summaryZh: 一项荟萃分析研究了儿童和青少年坐位体前屈柔韧性方面的性别差异。
items.curatedReasonEn: This meta-analysis reveals sex differences in sit-and-reach flexibility in children and adolescents. You can incorporate these sex differences when assessing flexibility in children and adolescents to provide more individualized recommendations for athletic performance and injury prevention.
items.limitation: 荟萃分析的结果可能受纳入研究异质性的影响，需要审慎解读其普适性。
items.limitationEn: The results of the meta-analysis may be influenced by the heterogeneity of the included studies, requiring careful interpretation of their generalizability.

items.title: Associations between nutritional risk indices and fall history in older adults: a retrospective cross-sectional study | BMC Geriatrics | Springer Nature Link
items.summary: A retrospective cross-sectional study found associations between nutritional risk indices and fall history in older adults.
items.curatedReason: 这项回顾性横断面研究发现营养风险指数与老年人跌倒史之间存在关联。这意味着你在评估老年患者跌倒风险时，需要将营养状况纳入考量，并与营养师协作，提供更全面的预防策略。
items.titleZh: 营养风险指数与老年人跌倒史的关联：一项回顾性横断面研究
items.summaryZh: 一项回顾性横断面研究发现，老年人的营养风险指数与跌倒史之间存在关联。
items.curatedReasonEn: This retrospective cross-sectional study found an association between nutritional risk indices and a history of falls in older adults. This implies that when assessing fall risk in elderly patients, you need to consider nutritional status and collaborate with dietitians to provide more comprehensive prevention strategies.
items.limitation: 作为回顾性横断面研究，不能建立因果关系，且可能存在回忆偏倚。
items.limitationEn: As a retrospective cross-sectional study, it cannot establish causality and may be subject to recall bias.

items.title: Exercise, daily physical activity, and age-specific cumulative incidence of mobility decline: an 8-year cohort study of locomotive syndrome | European Review of Aging and Physical Activity | Springer Nature Link
items.summary: An 8-year cohort study investigated exercise, daily physical activity, and age-specific cumulative incidence of mobility decline in locomotive syndrome.
items.curatedReason: 这项 8 年队列研究分析了运动、日常身体活动与机能综合征移动能力下降的年龄特异性累积发生率。该研究强调了身体活动对老年人移动能力维护的重要性，进一步强化了你推广运动干预作为预防衰弱的核心手段的证据。
items.titleZh: 运动、日常身体活动与移动能力下降的年龄特异性累积发生率：一项机能综合征的 8 年队列研究
items.summaryZh: 一项为期 8 年的队列研究调查了运动、日常身体活动与机能综合征中移动能力下降的年龄特异性累积发生率。
items.curatedReasonEn: This 8-year cohort study analyzed the age-specific cumulative incidence of mobility decline in locomotive syndrome, considering exercise and daily physical activity. This study underscores the importance of physical activity for maintaining mobility in older adults, further strengthening the evidence for promoting exercise interventions as a core strategy to prevent frailty.
items.limitation: 作为队列研究，虽然观察时间长，但仍可能存在未测量混杂因素对结果的影响。
items.limitationEn: As a cohort study, although the observation period is long, unmeasured confounding factors may still influence the results.

items.title: Abdominal Aortic Calcification on Lumbar X-rays Predicts Hip Fracture Risk: Study Reveals
items.summary: A study found that abdominal aortic calcification (AAC) visible on routine lumbar spine X-rays is significantly associated with an increased risk of hip fractures in older adults, with an AAC score of 5 or higher strongly linked to fracture occurrence.
items.curatedReason: 这项研究发现，腰椎 X 光片上的腹主动脉钙化（AAC）可预测髋部骨折风险。你可以将 AAC 评分作为评估老年患者骨折风险的一个额外影像学指标，尤其是在常规腰椎检查中顺带发现时，及时转诊至骨科或老年科进行干预。
items.titleZh: 研究揭示：腰椎 X 光片上的腹主动脉钙化可预测髋部骨折风险
items.summaryZh: 一项研究发现，常规腰椎 X 光片上可见的腹主动脉钙化（AAC）与老年人髋部骨折风险显著相关，AAC 评分 5 分或更高与骨折发生率密切相关。
items.curatedReasonEn: This study found that abdominal aortic calcification (AAC) on lumbar X-rays predicts hip fracture risk. You can use AAC scores as an additional imaging indicator when assessing fracture risk in elderly patients, especially when incidentally found during routine lumbar spine examinations, to facilitate timely referral to orthopedics or geriatrics for intervention.
items.limitation: 作为观察性研究，不能建立因果关系，且研究仅限于日本患者，结果可能存在地域差异。
items.limitationEn: As an observational study, it cannot establish causality, and the study was limited to Japanese patients, so the results may have regional differences.

items.title: Can the Effects of Exercise Therapy on Achilles Tendinopathy Be Enhanced by Adding Nutritional Advice-A Randomized Controlled Pilot Study
items.summary: A randomized controlled pilot study investigated whether adding nutritional advice to exercise therapy enhances its effects on Achilles tendinopathy.
items.curatedReason: 这项随机对照预试验表明，对跟腱病患者在运动治疗中加入营养建议可能无法额外增强治疗效果。你可以继续将运动疗法作为跟腱病的核心干预，但对营养干预的辅助作用需持谨慎态度，不宜过分强调。
items.titleZh: 随机对照预试验：营养建议能否增强运动疗法对跟腱病的治疗效果？
items.summaryZh: 一项随机对照预试验旨在探讨在运动疗法中加入营养建议是否能增强其对跟腱病的治疗效果。
items.curatedReasonEn: This randomized controlled pilot study suggests that adding nutritional advice to exercise therapy for Achilles tendinopathy may not further enhance treatment effects. You can continue to prioritize exercise therapy as the core intervention for Achilles tendinopathy, but be cautious about overemphasizing the supplementary role of nutritional interventions.
items.limitation: 这是一项初步的预试验，样本量和随访时间有限，需要更大规模的RCT验证。
items.limitationEn: This is a preliminary pilot study with limited sample size and follow-up, requiring larger-scale RCTs for validation.

items.title: Effect of 12-week dynamic stretching of hamstrings on joint flexibility and musculoskeletal properties | European Journal of Applied Physiology | Springer Nature Link
items.summary: A 12-week dynamic stretching program for hamstrings improved joint flexibility, muscle strength, and musculoskeletal properties in the stretched limb, with the non-stretched limb assessed for comparison.
items.curatedReason: 这项研究提供了股后肌群动态拉伸对关节柔韧性、肌肉力量和肌肉骨骼特性的影响数据。你可以将这些结果作为制定和调整拉伸方案的参考，尤其是在考量长期动态拉伸对运动表现和损伤预防的潜在效益时。
items.titleZh: 12 周股后肌群动态拉伸对关节柔韧性和肌肉骨骼特性的影响
items.summaryZh: 一项研究发现，为期 12 周的股后肌群动态拉伸方案改善了拉伸肢体的关节柔韧性、肌肉力量和肌肉骨骼特性，并与非拉伸肢体进行了比较评估。
items.curatedReasonEn: This study provides data on the effects of 12-week dynamic hamstring stretching on joint flexibility, muscle strength, and musculoskeletal properties. You can use these results as a reference for designing and adjusting stretching programs, especially when considering the potential benefits of long-term dynamic stretching for athletic performance and injury prevention.
items.limitation: 研究未提供具体的样本量和对照组信息，限制了结论的普遍性和强度。
items.limitationEn: The study did not provide specific sample size and control group information, limiting the generality and strength of the conclusions.

items.title: BMJ Rapid Recommendations | The BMJ
items.summary: The BMJ's Rapid Recommendations project aims to accelerate the translation of new research evidence into clinical guidelines, working with MAGIC to provide trustworthy recommendations quickly and transparently.
items.curatedReason: BMJ 的“快速推荐”项目旨在加速最新研究证据转化为临床指南。你需要关注这个平台，因为它会提供及时、证据分级的实践建议，帮助你快速了解和采纳改变临床实践的新证据。
items.titleZh: BMJ 快速推荐：加速证据转化为实践的指南项目
items.summaryZh: BMJ 的“快速推荐”项目旨在与 MAGIC 合作，通过值得信赖的建议，快速透明地将新研究证据转化为临床指南。
items.curatedReasonEn: BMJ's "Rapid Recommendations" initiative aims to accelerate the translation of new research evidence into clinical guidelines. You should follow this platform as it provides timely, evidence-graded practice advice, helping you quickly understand and adopt new evidence that changes clinical practice.

items.title: Intravaginal dehydroepiandrosterone for the treatment of vulvovaginal atrophy: a systematic review and meta-analysis
items.summary: A systematic review and meta-analysis assessed the therapeutic efficacy of intravaginal dehydroepiandrosterone (DHEA) for vulvovaginal atrophy in postmenopausal women.
items.curatedReason: 这项系统综述和荟萃分析评估了阴道内脱氢表雄酮（DHEA）治疗外阴阴道萎缩的疗效。虽然 DHEA 主要是药物治疗，但了解其疗效背景有助于你更全面地评估患者状况，并与主治医师讨论联合治疗方案，尤其是在物理治疗辅助手段不佳时。
items.titleZh: 阴道内脱氢表雄酮治疗外阴阴道萎缩：一项系统综述和荟萃分析
items.summaryZh: 一项系统综述和荟萃分析评估了绝经后女性使用阴道内脱氢表雄酮（DHEA）治疗外阴阴道萎缩的疗效。
items.curatedReasonEn: This systematic review and meta-analysis evaluated the efficacy of intravaginal dehydroepiandrosterone (DHEA) for vulvovaginal atrophy. While DHEA is primarily a pharmaceutical treatment, understanding its efficacy context helps you comprehensively assess patient conditions and discuss combination therapies with primary physicians, especially when physical therapy alone is insufficient.
items.limitation: 综述未提供具体纳入研究的数量和患者样本量，限制了结论的精确性。
items.limitationEn: The review did not provide the specific number of included studies and patient sample sizes, limiting the precision of the conclusions.

items.title: ChainBMD: A deep learning framework for stroke evaluation and guidance using kinetic chain graphs and temporal analysis - ScienceDirect
items.summary: ChainBMD is a deep learning framework for stroke evaluation and guidance using kinetic chain graphs and temporal analysis.
items.curatedReason: ChainBMD 是一种基于深度学习的卒中评估和指导框架，利用动力链图和时间分析。你可以关注这类智能评估工具的进展，它们有望为卒中患者提供更客观、更个性化的康复训练指导。
items.titleZh: ChainBMD：基于动力链图和时间分析的卒中评估与指导深度学习框架
items.summaryZh: ChainBMD 是一种利用动力链图和时间分析进行卒中评估和指导的深度学习框架。
items.curatedReasonEn: ChainBMD is a deep learning framework for stroke evaluation and guidance, using kinetic chain graphs and temporal analysis. You can keep an eye on the advancements of such intelligent assessment tools, as they are expected to provide more objective and personalized rehabilitation training guidance for stroke patients.
items.limitation: 作为深度学习框架，其在真实临床环境中的泛化能力和数据可获得性需进一步验证。
items.limitationEn: As a deep learning framework, its generalization ability and data availability in real clinical settings need further validation.

items.title: Stereotactic ablation for patients with Parkinson’s disease (PD): technical insights and long-term outcomes | The Egyptian Journal of Neurology, Psychiatry and Neurosurgery | Springer Nature Link
items.summary: This research provides technical insights and long-term outcomes of stereotactic ablation for patients with Parkinson’s disease.
items.curatedReason: 这项研究探讨了帕金森病（PD）立体定向消融术的技术细节和长期结局。虽然消融术是神经外科干预，但了解其适应症和术后预期有助于你更好地与患者和外科团队沟通，并规划术后康复方案。
items.titleZh: 帕金森病（PD）患者立体定向消融术：技术见解与长期结局
items.summaryZh: 这项研究提供了帕金森病患者立体定向消融术的技术见解和长期结局。
items.curatedReasonEn: This study explores the technical insights and long-term outcomes of stereotactic ablation for Parkinson's disease (PD). While ablation is a neurosurgical intervention, understanding its indications and postoperative expectations can help you better communicate with patients and surgical teams, and plan postoperative rehabilitation programs.
items.limitation: 作为手术结局研究，并未直接涉及康复干预，因此其对物理治疗实践的直接指导有限。
items.limitationEn: As a surgical outcome study, it did not directly involve rehabilitation interventions, thus its direct guidance for physical therapy practice is limited.

items.title: Branched-chain amino acids alleviate Parkinson’s neurodegeneration via microbial propionate-dependent restoration of the PI3K/Akt/mTORC1 axis - ScienceDirect
items.summary: This research indicates that branched-chain amino acids alleviate Parkinson’s neurodegeneration via microbial propionate-dependent restoration of the PI3K/Akt/mTORC1 axis.
items.curatedReason: 这项研究揭示了支链氨基酸通过微生物丙酸依赖性途径缓解帕金森神经退行性病变。作为物理治疗师，你可以将此信息作为跨学科合作的背景知识，关注营养干预对神经康复的潜在辅助作用，但目前不宜直接作为临床干预依据。
items.titleZh: 支链氨基酸通过微生物丙酸依赖性途径缓解帕金森神经退行性病变
items.summaryZh: 这项研究表明，支链氨基酸通过微生物丙酸依赖性 PI3K/Akt/mTORC1 通路恢复，从而缓解帕金森病神经退行性病变。
items.curatedReasonEn: This study reveals that branched-chain amino acids alleviate Parkinson's neurodegeneration via a microbial propionate-dependent pathway. As a physical therapist, you can use this information as background knowledge for interdisciplinary collaboration, focusing on the potential adjunctive role of nutritional interventions in neurorehabilitation, but it should not be directly used as a basis for clinical intervention at this time.
items.limitation: 这是一项机制研究，还需要进一步的临床试验来验证其在人体中的治疗效果和安全性。
items.limitationEn: This is a mechanistic study, and further clinical trials are needed to verify its therapeutic effects and safety in humans.

items.title: The IL-17A modulating astrocytic activity was associated with the electroacupuncture-mediated improvement of sensorimotor ability after stroke | Chinese Medicine | Springer Nature Link
items.summary: This research suggests that IL-17A modulating astrocytic activity was associated with the electroacupuncture-mediated improvement of sensorimotor ability after stroke.
items.curatedReason: 这项研究探讨了 IL-17A 调节星形胶质细胞活性与电针改善卒中后感觉运动能力之间的关联。这为电针在神经康复中的作用提供了新的生物学机制理解，你可以将其视为传统疗法与现代医学结合的进展之一。
items.titleZh: IL-17A 调节星形胶质细胞活性与电针改善卒中后感觉运动能力相关
items.summaryZh: 这项研究表明，IL-17A 调节星形胶质细胞活性与电针改善卒中后感觉运动能力之间存在关联。
items.curatedReasonEn: This study explores the association between IL-17A modulated astrocytic activity and electroacupuncture-mediated improvement of sensorimotor ability after stroke. This provides a new understanding of the biological mechanisms of electroacupuncture in neurorehabilitation. You can view this as an advancement in combining traditional therapies with modern medicine.
items.limitation: 研究未明确是否为人体试验，若为动物研究则结论无法直接外推至临床实践。
items.limitationEn: The study did not specify if it was a human trial; if it was an animal study, the conclusions cannot be directly extrapolated to clinical practice.

items.title: Prevalence of femoroacetabular impingement syndrome and related hip morphologies, and its developmental dose-response relationship in professional female football players: a multicentre cohort study (PROFE)
items.summary: A multicentre cohort study investigated the prevalence of femoroacetabular impingement syndrome and related hip morphologies, and its developmental dose-response relationship in professional female football players.
items.curatedReason: 这项多中心队列研究调查了职业女足球运动员股髋臼撞击综合征（FAI）及其相关髋部形态的患病率和发育剂量-反应关系。你可以将这些数据作为评估和预防女性运动员 FAI 的参考，尤其是在早期识别风险和制定针对性训练计划时。
items.titleZh: 多中心队列研究：职业女足球运动员股髋臼撞击综合征及相关髋部形态的患病率和发育剂量-反应关系
items.summaryZh: 一项多中心队列研究调查了职业女足球运动员股髋臼撞击综合征及其相关髋部形态的患病率，以及其发育剂量-反应关系。
items.curatedReasonEn: This multicentre cohort study investigated the prevalence and developmental dose-response relationship of femoroacetabular impingement syndrome (FAI) and related hip morphologies in professional female football players. You can use these data as a reference for assessing and preventing FAI in female athletes, especially in early risk identification and targeted training program development.
items.limitation: 作为队列研究，无法建立因果关系，且结果可能受到混杂因素的影响。
items.limitationEn: As a cohort study, it cannot establish causality, and the results may be influenced by confounding factors.

items.summary: This is a study protocol for a randomized controlled trial of the Baby HABIT-ILE intervention in infants aged 6–18 months with unilateral cerebral palsy.
items.curatedReason: 这是一项针对 6-18 个月单侧脑瘫婴儿的 Baby HABIT-ILE 干预随机对照试验的研究方案。你可以关注这类早期干预方案的设计思路和预期结果，这对于了解脑瘫儿童的早期康复策略至关重要。
items.titleZh: Baby HABIT-ILE 干预：6-18 个月单侧脑瘫婴儿随机对照试验研究方案
items.summaryZh: 这是一项针对 6-18 个月单侧脑瘫婴儿的 Baby HABIT-ILE 干预随机对照试验的研究方案。
items.curatedReasonEn: This is a study protocol for a randomized controlled trial of Baby HABIT-ILE intervention in infants aged 6–18 months with unilateral cerebral palsy. You can pay attention to the design ideas and expected results of such early intervention programs, which are crucial for understanding early rehabilitation strategies for children with cerebral palsy.
items.limitation: 这是一项研究方案，尚未发布最终结果，因此不能提供实际的临床证据。
items.limitationEn: This is a study protocol, and the final results have not yet been published, so it cannot provide actual clinical evidence.

items.title: Beyond skills: Reimagining clinical education for a transformative future | Myezwa | South African Journal of Physiotherapy
items.summary: This editorial discusses reimagining clinical education for a transformative future in physiotherapy.
items.curatedReason: 这篇社论呼吁重新构想物理治疗临床教育，超越单纯技能培养，迈向变革性未来。你可以将这篇评论视为对行业教育改革的最新思考，关注其提出的理念如何影响你或你所在机构的 PT 教育实践。
items.titleZh: 超越技能：重新构想物理治疗临床教育，迈向变革性未来
items.summaryZh: 这篇社论探讨了重新构想物理治疗临床教育，以迈向变革性未来的议题。
items.curatedReasonEn: This editorial calls for reimagining physiotherapy clinical education beyond mere skill development, towards a transformative future. You can view this commentary as the latest thinking on industry education reform, focusing on how its proposed ideas might influence your or your institution's PT education practices.
items.limitation: 作为社论，其观点不基于系统性证据，旨在引发讨论和思考，不提供具体临床干预指导。
items.limitationEn: As an editorial, its views are not based on systematic evidence and are intended to provoke discussion and thought, not to provide specific clinical intervention guidance.

items.title: Piloting a Tier 1 Strength-Based Parent Education Play Program: Promoting Play Within the Family Context
items.summary: A pilot, mixed-methods group, pre-post study assessed the effectiveness of a Tier 1 strength-based play program on parents' ability to support their child's play and build parental sense of competence.
items.curatedReason: 这项试点研究评估了以优势为基础的亲子教育游戏项目对父母支持孩子游戏能力和提升父母胜任感的效果。你可以参考这种以家庭为中心的早期干预模式，将其融入你的儿科物理治疗实践中，以增强家庭参与和赋能。
items.titleZh: 试点一项基于优势的亲子教育游戏项目：促进家庭环境中的游戏
items.summaryZh: 一项混合方法组前瞻性试点研究评估了分级制（Tier 1）优势导向游戏项目对父母支持孩子游戏能力和提升父母胜任感的有效性。
items.curatedReasonEn: This pilot study assessed the effectiveness of a Tier 1 strength-based parent education play program on parents' ability to support their child's play and build parental sense of competence. You can refer to this family-centered early intervention model and integrate it into your pediatric physical therapy practice to enhance family engagement and empowerment.
items.limitation: 作为试点研究，样本量较小（46 名家长，12 名分配到电子组），且为混合方法设计，需要更大规模的 RCT 验证。
items.limitationEn: As a pilot study, the sample size is small (46 parents, 12 assigned to e-group), and it uses a mixed-methods design, requiring larger-scale RCTs for validation.

items.title: Experience-based co-design to refine a remote parent-mediated intervention program for preterm infants after NICU discharge: a qualitative study | BMC Pediatrics | Springer Nature Link
items.summary: A qualitative study used experience-based co-design to refine a remote parent-mediated intervention program for preterm infants after NICU discharge.
items.curatedReason: 这项定性研究使用经验共创设计，旨在优化早产儿 NICU 出院后的远程亲子干预项目。你可以从中了解远程康复项目在儿科领域的实施和优化过程，并汲取经验，以提升远程干预的依从性和效果。
items.titleZh: 经验共创设计优化 NICU 出院早产儿远程亲子干预项目：一项定性研究
items.summaryZh: 一项定性研究采用经验共创设计，旨在优化早产儿从新生儿重症监护室（NICU）出院后的远程亲子干预项目。
items.curatedReasonEn: This qualitative study used experience-based co-design to refine a remote parent-mediated intervention program for preterm infants after NICU discharge. You can learn about the implementation and optimization process of remote rehabilitation programs in the pediatric field and draw lessons to improve the adherence and effectiveness of remote interventions.
items.limitation: 作为定性研究，其结果不具有普遍性，需要进一步的定量研究来验证干预的有效性。
items.limitationEn: As a qualitative study, its results are not generalizable and require further quantitative research to validate the effectiveness of the intervention.

items.title: Study protocol for FAXAge: a randomized, controlled clinical trial of fasting and exercise to slow aging in humans | GeroScience | Springer Nature Link
items.summary: This is the study protocol for FAXAge, a randomized, controlled clinical trial of fasting and exercise to slow aging in humans.
items.curatedReason: 这是 FAXAge 研究的方案，一项随机对照临床试验，旨在通过禁食和运动来延缓人类衰老。虽然是方案，但你可以关注其在运动干预设计上的细节，以及如何将禁食等生活方式干预纳入康复研究的框架，这代表了抗衰老领域的前沿探索。
items.titleZh: FAXAge 研究方案：一项通过禁食和运动延缓人类衰老的随机对照临床试验
items.summaryZh: 这是 FAXAge 研究方案，一项旨在通过禁食和运动延缓人类衰老的随机对照临床试验。
items.curatedReasonEn: This is the protocol for the FAXAge study, a randomized controlled clinical trial designed to slow aging in humans through fasting and exercise. Although it is a protocol, you can pay attention to the details of its exercise intervention design and how lifestyle interventions like fasting are incorporated into rehabilitation research frameworks, representing cutting-edge exploration in anti-aging.
items.limitation: 这是一项研究方案，尚未发布最终结果，因此不能提供实际的临床证据。
items.limitationEn: This is a study protocol, and the final results have not yet been published, so it cannot provide actual clinical evidence.

items.title: Comparison between ultrasound guided pericapsular nerve group (PENG) block and interscalene brachial plexus block for postoperative analgesia following shoulder arthroscopy: a randomized controlled trial | BMC Anesthesiology | Springer Nature Link
items.summary: A randomized controlled trial compared ultrasound-guided pericapsular nerve group (PENG) block and interscalene brachial plexus block for postoperative analgesia following shoulder arthroscopy.
items.curatedReason: 这项随机对照试验比较了两种神经阻滞方案在肩关节镜术后镇痛的效果。虽然主要关注点是麻醉，但其结果可作为你了解术后疼痛管理选择的背景信息，尤其是在术后早期康复疼痛控制的转诊考量中。
items.titleZh: 随机对照试验：超声引导下囊周神经组 (PENG) 阻滞与斜角肌间臂丛神经阻滞对肩关节镜术后镇痛的比较
items.summaryZh: 一项随机对照试验比较了超声引导下囊周神经组 (PENG) 阻滞与斜角肌间臂丛神经阻滞在肩关节镜术后镇痛方面的效果。
items.curatedReasonEn: This randomized controlled trial compared two nerve block techniques for postoperative analgesia after shoulder arthroscopy. While the primary focus is anesthesia, the results provide background information on postoperative pain management options, particularly for referral considerations in early rehabilitation pain control.
items.limitation: 研究主要关注麻醉效果，其对长期康复结局的影响未被评估。
items.limitationEn: The study primarily focused on anesthetic efficacy, and its impact on long-term rehabilitation outcomes was not assessed.

items.title: A preliminary analysis of the inflammatory protein landscape in the CSF of mid- to late-stage Parkinson’s disease: associations with motor severity and subtypes | BMC Neurology | Springer Nature Link
items.summary: A preliminary analysis characterized the inflammatory protein landscape in the CSF of mid- to late-stage Parkinson’s disease and its associations with motor severity and subtypes.
items.curatedReason: 这项初步分析探讨了中晚期帕金森病脑脊液中炎症蛋白与运动严重程度和亚型的关联。了解这些生物标志物有助于你更深入地理解帕金森病的病理生理机制，但目前不直接影响康复实践。
items.titleZh: 中晚期帕金森病脑脊液炎症蛋白图谱的初步分析：与运动严重程度和亚型的关联
items.summaryZh: 一项初步分析研究了中晚期帕金森病患者脑脊液中的炎症蛋白图谱及其与运动严重程度和亚型的关联。
items.curatedReasonEn: This preliminary analysis explores the association between inflammatory proteins in the CSF of mid- to late-stage Parkinson's disease and motor severity and subtypes. Understanding these biomarkers helps you gain a deeper understanding of the pathophysiological mechanisms of Parkinson's disease, but it does not directly affect rehabilitation practice at present.
items.limitation: 这是一项初步分析，样本量和研究设计可能限制了结论的普遍性和确定性。
items.limitationEn: This is a preliminary analysis, and the sample size and study design may limit the generalizability and certainty of the conclusions.

items.title: Cannabidiol alleviates traumatic brain injury-induced neuronal damage and cognitive deficits by inhibiting ferroptosis via the TRPV1/MCU/PI3K/Akt pathway
items.summary: This research found that cannabidiol (CBD) alleviates traumatic brain injury-induced neuronal damage and cognitive deficits by inhibiting ferroptosis via the TRPV1/MCU/PI3K/Akt pathway.
items.curatedReason: 这项研究揭示了大麻二酚（CBD）通过抑制铁死亡途径，减轻创伤性脑损伤（TBI）引起的神经元损伤和认知功能障碍。虽然是药物机制研究，但了解这些潜在的神经保护策略对未来 TBI 康复的整体管理有启发作用，关注其临床转化潜力。
items.titleZh: 大麻二酚通过抑制 TRPV1/MCU/PI3K/Akt 途径的铁死亡，减轻创伤性脑损伤引起的神经元损伤和认知缺陷
items.summaryZh: 这项研究发现，大麻二酚（CBD）通过抑制 TRPV1/MCU/PI3K/Akt 途径的铁死亡，减轻了创伤性脑损伤引起的神经元损伤和认知缺陷。
items.curatedReasonEn: This study reveals that cannabidiol (CBD) alleviates traumatic brain injury (TBI)-induced neuronal damage and cognitive deficits by inhibiting the ferroptosis pathway. While this is a drug mechanism study, understanding these potential neuroprotective strategies is insightful for the overall management of future TBI rehabilitation. Pay attention to its potential for clinical translation.
items.limitation: 这是一项细胞和动物模型研究，其结果不能直接推断到人体临床实践。
items.limitationEn: This is a cell and animal model study, and its results cannot be directly extrapolated to human clinical practice.

items.title: Gastrocnemius medialis muscle architecture and its relationship with countermovement jump performance differ between male academy soccer players and control participants | European Journal of Applied Physiology | Springer Nature Link
items.summary: This study found that gastrocnemius medialis muscle architecture and its relationship with countermovement jump performance differed between male academy soccer players and control participants.
items.curatedReason: 这项研究比较了男性足球青训球员与对照组腓肠肌内侧肌肉结构和反向跳跃表现的差异。这些生理学和生物力学数据有助于你更好地理解高水平足球运动员的特有适应性，为运动表现训练和损伤预防提供参考。
items.titleZh: 男性足球青训球员与对照组腓肠肌内侧肌肉结构及与反向跳跃表现的关系差异
items.summaryZh: 这项研究发现，男性足球青训球员与对照组在腓肠肌内侧肌肉结构及其与反向跳跃表现的关系上存在差异。
items.curatedReasonEn: This study compared gastrocnemius medialis muscle architecture and countermovement jump performance between male academy soccer players and control participants. These physiological and biomechanical data help you better understand the unique adaptations of high-level soccer players, providing a reference for athletic performance training and injury prevention.
items.limitation: 研究对象仅限于男性足球青训球员，结果可能不适用于其他运动员群体或普通人群。
items.limitationEn: The study subjects were limited to male academy soccer players, and the results may not be applicable to other athlete populations or the general population.

items.title: The longitudinal analysis of the effect of compression wear on muscle lactate recovery rate using bioimpedance: A case study - ScienceDirect
items.summary: A case study longitudinally analyzed the effect of compression wear on muscle lactate recovery rate using bioimpedance.
items.curatedReason: 这项案例研究纵向分析了压力衣对肌肉乳酸恢复率的影响。你可以将此作为了解运动后恢复策略的辅助信息，但需注意这仅是个案研究，其结论不能直接推广到所有患者。
items.titleZh: 压力衣对肌肉乳酸恢复率影响的纵向分析：一项生物阻抗案例研究
items.summaryZh: 一项案例研究利用生物阻抗技术，纵向分析了压力衣对肌肉乳酸恢复率的影响。
items.curatedReasonEn: This case study longitudinally analyzed the effect of compression wear on muscle lactate recovery rate. You can use this as supplementary information to understand post-exercise recovery strategies, but note that this is a case study, and its conclusions cannot be directly generalized to all patients.
items.limitation: 这是一项单案例研究，其结果不具有普遍性，无法作为指导临床实践的强证据。
items.limitationEn: This is a single case study, and its results are not generalizable and cannot serve as strong evidence for guiding clinical practice.

items.title: Fracture Risk Following Hardware Removal in Children With Arthrogryposis
items.summary: This study aimed to identify the incidence of fracture and infection following hardware removal in children with arthrogryposis and compare them to a matched cohort of patients with cerebral palsy.
items.curatedReason: 这项研究旨在识别关节挛缩症患儿硬件移除后骨折和感染的发生率。了解这些并发症风险有助于你在术后康复中更加警惕，并与外科医生共同管理潜在风险。
items.titleZh: 关节挛缩症患儿硬件移除后的骨折风险
items.summaryZh: 这项研究旨在确定关节挛缩症患儿硬件移除后骨折和感染的发生率，并与匹配的脑瘫患者队列进行比较。
items.curatedReasonEn: This study aims to identify the incidence of fractures and infections following hardware removal in children with arthrogryposis. Understanding these complication risks helps you be more vigilant in postoperative rehabilitation and co-manage potential risks with surgeons.
items.limitation: 这是一项回顾性研究，可能存在选择偏倚和数据完整性问题，结果需要谨慎解读。
items.limitationEn: This is a retrospective study, which may have selection bias and data completeness issues, so the results need to be interpreted cautiously.

items.title: Training Early Childhood Educators to Observe, Assess and Enhance Discrete Play Skills | Early Childhood Education Journal | Springer Nature Link
items.summary: This intervention study described how 39 early childhood teachers were trained to observe, assess, and enhance discrete sensorimotor, functional, and symbolic play skills by completing a professional development course.
items.curatedReason: 这项干预研究描述了如何通过专业发展课程培训早期儿童教育者观察、评估和增强离散游戏技能。作为儿科物理治疗师，你可以从中了解跨专业合作（与早期教育者）的模式，以及如何将游戏干预融入更广泛的儿童发展支持体系。
items.titleZh: 培训早期儿童教育者观察、评估和增强离散游戏技能
items.summaryZh: 这项干预研究描述了 39 名早期儿童教师如何通过完成一项专业发展课程，学习观察、评估和增强离散的感觉运动、功能和象征性游戏技能。
items.curatedReasonEn: This intervention study describes how early childhood educators were trained to observe, assess, and enhance discrete play skills through a professional development course. As a pediatric physical therapist, you can learn about interprofessional collaboration models (with early educators) and how to integrate play interventions into broader child development support systems.
items.limitation: 研究未提供具体的样本量和对照组信息，限制了结论的普遍性和强度。
items.limitationEn: The study did not provide specific sample size and control group information, limiting the generality and strength of the conclusions.

items.title: Predicting 18-month M-CHAT-R/F With PediaTracTMv3.0 Motor and Social/Communication/Cognition Domains | Journal of Autism and Developmental Disorders | Springer Nature Link
items.summary: This research explored predicting 18-month M-CHAT-R/F with PediaTracTMv3.0 Motor and Social/Communication/Cognition Domains.
items.curatedReason: 这项研究探讨了使用 PediaTracTMv3.0 运动和社会/沟通/认知领域预测 18 个月 M-CHAT-R/F 筛查结果。你可以了解这些工具在早期筛查自闭症谱系障碍中的应用，并在早期干预的转诊评估中考虑其价值。
items.titleZh: 利用 PediaTracTMv3.0 运动和社会/沟通/认知领域预测 18 个月 M-CHAT-R/F
items.summaryZh: 这项研究探讨了利用 PediaTracTMv3.0 运动和社会/沟通/认知领域来预测 18 个月 M-CHAT-R/F 筛查结果。
items.curatedReasonEn: This study explores the use of PediaTracTMv3.0 motor and social/communication/cognition domains to predict 18-month M-CHAT-R/F screening results. You can learn about the application of these tools in early screening for autism spectrum disorder and consider their value in referral assessments for early intervention.
items.limitation: 研究的预测效度具体数值未明确，可能限制了其作为独立诊断工具的可靠性。
items.limitationEn: The specific predictive validity values of the study were not clearly stated, which may limit its reliability as an independent diagnostic tool.

items.title: Implementation and effectiveness of the web‑based skills training START NOW in adolescents in residential youth care: a cluster randomized controlled trial | Child and Adolescent Psychiatry and Mental Health | Springer Nature Link
items.summary: A cluster randomized controlled trial investigated the implementation and effectiveness of the web-based skills training START NOW in adolescents in residential youth care.
items.curatedReason: 这项集群随机对照试验探讨了网络技能训练 START NOW 在青少年住宿式青年照护中的实施和有效性。虽然主要关注心理健康，但其对青少年技能训练和干预交付模式的评估，可以为你设计和评估青少年康复项目提供参考。
items.titleZh: 网络技能训练 START NOW 在青少年住宿式青年照护中的实施和有效性：一项集群随机对照试验
items.summaryZh: 一项集群随机对照试验研究了网络技能训练 START NOW 在青少年住宿式青年照护中的实施和有效性。
items.curatedReasonEn: This cluster randomized controlled trial investigated the implementation and effectiveness of the web-based skills training START NOW in adolescents in residential youth care. While primarily focused on mental health, its assessment of adolescent skills training and intervention delivery models can provide a reference for you in designing and evaluating adolescent rehabilitation programs.
items.limitation: 研究主要关注心理健康结局，对身体功能和运动技能康复的直接影响未被明确评估。
items.limitationEn: The study primarily focused on mental health outcomes, and the direct impact on physical function and motor skill rehabilitation was not clearly assessed.

items.title: Development of a Core Patient-Reported Outcome (Measures) Set for Pediatric Physical Therapy.
items.summary: A study developed a core set of nine patient-reported outcomes (PROs) and corresponding measures (PROMs) for pediatric physical therapy, grouped into three domains (functioning, general well-being, and social/environmental), to standardize assessment in practice, research, and quality assessment.
items.curatedReason: 核心患者报告结局（PROs）及其测量工具（PROMs）的开发，能帮助儿科物理治疗师在日常实践、研究和质量评估中更标准化地评估疗效。未来可期待其推广应用，提升儿科PT的循证实践水平。
items.titleZh: 儿科物理治疗核心患者报告结局（测量）集的开发
items.summaryZh: 一项研究开发了一套包含九个核心患者报告结局（PROs）及其测量工具（PROMs），分为三个领域（功能、整体健康和社会/环境），旨在标准化儿科物理治疗在实践、研究和质量评估中的疗效评估。
items.limitation: PROs 和 PROMs 的开发是一个复杂过程，其最终的临床实用性和心理测量学特性仍需在不同人群中进行广泛验证。
items.limitationEn: The development of PROs and PROMs is a complex process, and their ultimate clinical utility and psychometric properties still require extensive validation across diverse populations.
items.journal: Pediatric physical therapy : the official publication of the Section on Pediatrics of the American Physical Therapy Association

items.title: Improved Flexor Spasticity in Patients with Chronic Stroke Using a Dynamic Wrist-Hand Stretching Device: A Pilot Randomized Controlled Trial.
items.summary: A pilot RCT involving 30 chronic stroke patients found that a novel dynamic wrist-hand stretching device improved flexor spasticity and hand function, offering a potential tool for long-term management.
items.curatedReason: 这款动态腕手牵伸器械在慢性卒中患者屈肌痉挛管理上，显示出改善痉挛和手功能潜能，为需要居家长期管理又缺乏监督的患者提供了新工具。可以开始关注同类器械的临床验证与可及性。
items.titleZh: 动态腕手牵伸器械改善慢性卒中患者屈肌痉挛：一项初步随机对照试验
items.summaryZh: 一项纳入30名慢性卒中患者的初步随机对照试验发现，一款新型动态腕手牵伸器械能改善屈肌痉挛并提升手功能，为长期管理提供了潜在工具。
items.curatedReasonEn: This dynamic wrist-hand stretching device shows potential in managing flexor spasticity and improving hand function in chronic stroke patients, offering a new tool for those requiring long-term home management with minimal supervision. Start monitoring the clinical validation and availability of similar devices.
items.limitation: 这是一项小样本的初步随机对照试验，结果可能无法完全推广至更广泛的卒中人群，且长期效果有待进一步验证。
items.limitationEn: This is a pilot randomized controlled trial with a small sample size, so the results may not be fully generalizable to a broader stroke population, and long-term efficacy needs further validation.

items.title: Amplifying the Work of Emerging Leaders in Hip/Groin Pain Research
items.summary: This editorial highlights and amplifies the work of emerging leaders in hip and groin pain research.
items.curatedReason: 这篇社论旨在推广青年研究者在髋/腹股沟疼痛领域的工作。对于了解该领域未来发展方向有一定参考。
items.titleZh: 弘扬髋/腹股沟疼痛研究领域新兴领导者的工作
items.summaryZh: 这篇社论旨在推广和表彰在髋关节及腹股沟疼痛研究领域中新兴领导者的工作。
items.curatedReasonEn: This editorial aims to promote the work of emerging researchers in hip/groin pain. It offers some insight into the future direction of this field.
items.journal: Journal of Orthopaedic & Sports Physical Therapy

items.title: Frontline agreement in diagnosis and treatment for musculoskeletal dysfunctions. A prospective, randomized, controlled study.
items.summary: This RCT found high agreement in diagnosis, treatment, and discharge decisions between physiotherapists (APP role) and resident physicians compared to senior physicians for non-urgent musculoskeletal conditions in the emergency department.
items.curatedReason: 在急诊场景中，物理治疗师（APP）与住院医师在骨科诊断、治疗及出院决策上与资深医师的判断高度一致。这意味着在骨骼肌肉疾病的早期管理中，物理治疗师可以承担更重要的角色，减轻急诊压力。
items.titleZh: 骨骼肌肉功能障碍诊断与治疗一线方案：前瞻性随机对照研究
items.summaryZh: 这项随机对照试验发现，在急诊科处理非紧急骨骼肌肉疾病时，物理治疗师（APP）与住院医师在诊断、治疗和出院决策上与资深医师的判断高度一致。
items.curatedReasonEn: In the ED, advanced practice physiotherapists (APPs) showed high agreement with senior physicians on musculoskeletal diagnoses, treatments, and discharge decisions, mirroring resident physicians. This supports expanding the PT's role in early MSK management within emergency settings to alleviate ED burden.
items.limitation: 本研究为单中心试验。
items.limitationEn: This was a single-center study.

items.title: Understanding Adult Hip Dysplasia: Clinical Presentation, Assessment Techniques, and Exercise-Driven Management Strategies
items.summary: This review provides an overview of adult hip dysplasia, focusing on its clinical presentation, assessment techniques, and exercise-driven management strategies to improve recognition and intervention.
items.curatedReason: 了解成人髋关节发育不良的临床表现、评估技术和运动驱动管理策略，能帮助你更早识别并有效干预这种往往被忽视的疾病。
items.titleZh: 理解成人髋关节发育不良：临床表现、评估技术和运动驱动管理策略
items.summaryZh: 本综述概述了成人髋关节发育不良，重点关注其临床表现、评估技术和运动驱动管理策略，以期提高疾病识别和干预效果。
items.curatedReasonEn: Understanding the clinical presentation, assessment techniques, and exercise-driven management strategies for adult hip dysplasia helps you identify and effectively intervene in this often-overlooked condition earlier.
items.journal: Journal of Orthopaedic & Sports Physical Therapy

items.title: Evaluating a 3-Month Physical Impairment and Functional Performance-Based Rehabilitation Program After Hip Arthroscopy for Femoroacetabular Impingement (FAI) Syndrome
items.summary: This study evaluated a 3-month physical impairment and functional performance-based rehabilitation program following hip arthroscopy for femoroacetabular impingement (FAI) syndrome.
items.curatedReason: 这项研究评估了髋关节镜术后股骨髋臼撞击综合征（FAI）的 3 个月康复方案。这为你提供了术后康复方案设计的实证参考，特别是注重身体功能障碍和功能表现的训练。
items.titleZh: 髋关节镜治疗股骨髋臼撞击综合征（FAI）后为期 3 个月的基于身体功能障碍和功能表现的康复方案评估
items.summaryZh: 本研究评估了髋关节镜治疗股骨髋臼撞击综合征（FAI）后为期 3 个月的基于身体功能障碍和功能表现的康复方案。
items.curatedReasonEn: This study evaluated a 3-month post-hip arthroscopy rehabilitation program for femoroacetabular impingement (FAI) syndrome. This provides evidence-based guidance for designing post-operative rehabilitation, particularly focusing on physical impairment and functional performance.
items.limitation: 未明确提及对照组。
items.limitationEn: No control group was explicitly mentioned.
items.journal: Journal of Orthopaedic & Sports Physical Therapy

items.title: Early-Stage Symptomatic Hip Osteoarthritis: A Window of Opportunity.
items.summary: This perspective argues for the importance of identifying and treating early-stage symptomatic hip osteoarthritis, particularly in young adults, as a window of opportunity to alter disease trajectory, similar to approaches for knee OA.
items.curatedReason: 早期有症状的髋关节骨关节炎可能是一个重要的干预窗口期，特别是年轻患者。作为物理治疗师，识别和干预早期病变有望改变疾病进程，避免晚期并发症。
items.titleZh: 早期有症状的髋关节骨关节炎：一个干预良机
items.summaryZh: 本述评强调识别和治疗早期有症状的髋关节骨关节炎的重要性，尤其是在年轻人中，认为这是一个改变疾病进程的干预良机，类似于膝关节骨关节炎的干预策略。
items.curatedReasonEn: Early-stage symptomatic hip osteoarthritis, especially in younger adults, presents a crucial intervention window. As a PT, early identification and intervention could alter disease trajectory and prevent later complications.
items.journal: The Journal of orthopaedic and sports physical therapy

related.title: Early-Stage Symptomatic Hip Osteoarthritis: A Window of Opportunity

items.title: Lived Experiences and Health Care Perspectives of People With Femoroacetabular Impingement (FAI) Syndrome: A Systematic Review of Qualitative Studies
items.summary: This systematic review of qualitative studies explores the lived experiences and healthcare perspectives of individuals with femoroacetabular impingement (FAI) syndrome.
items.curatedReason: 这项定性研究系统综述揭示了髋关节股骨髋臼撞击综合征（FAI）患者的生活体验和医疗视角。了解患者的真实感受有助于你更好地设计以患者为中心的康复方案。
items.titleZh: 髋关节股骨髋臼撞击综合征（FAI）患者的生活体验和医疗视角：定性研究系统综述
items.summaryZh: 这项定性研究的系统综述探讨了髋关节股骨髋臼撞击综合征（FAI）患者的生活体验和医疗视角。
items.curatedReasonEn: This systematic review of qualitative studies reveals the lived experiences and healthcare perspectives of individuals with femoroacetabular impingement (FAI) syndrome. Understanding patient experiences helps you design more patient-centered rehabilitation programs.
items.limitation: 定性研究的外推性可能有限。
items.limitationEn: Generalizability of qualitative studies may be limited.
items.journal: Journal of Orthopaedic & Sports Physical Therapy

items.title: Prevalence of Symphyseal Radiographic Findings and Skeletal Maturity and Their Relationship With Groin Symptoms in PROfessional FEmale Football Players: A Multicenter Cohort Study
items.summary: This multicenter cohort study investigated the prevalence of symphyseal radiographic findings and skeletal maturity, and their relationship with groin symptoms in professional female football players.
items.curatedReason: 这项多中心队列研究探讨了职业女子足球运动员耻骨联合影像学表现、骨骼成熟度与腹股沟症状的关系。这有助于你理解女性运动员特有的风险因素，优化预防和管理策略。
items.titleZh: 职业女子足球运动员耻骨联合影像学表现、骨骼成熟度与腹股沟症状的关系：一项多中心队列研究
items.summaryZh: 这项多中心队列研究调查了职业女子足球运动员耻骨联合影像学表现、骨骼成熟度及其与腹股沟症状的关系。
items.curatedReasonEn: This multicenter cohort study investigates the relationship between symphyseal radiographic findings, skeletal maturity, and groin symptoms in professional female football players. This helps you understand unique risk factors in female athletes for optimizing prevention and management strategies.
items.limitation: 观察研究无法确立因果关系。
items.limitationEn: Observational studies cannot establish causality.
items.journal: Journal of Orthopaedic & Sports Physical Therapy

items.title: Hip Muscle Strength Is Associated With Symptom Severity in People With Femoroacetabular Impingement Syndrome, but Only in Those With Preexisting Hip Muscle Weakness: A Secondary Analysis of Baseline Data From a Randomized Controlled Trial
items.summary: A secondary analysis of RCT baseline data found that hip muscle strength is associated with symptom severity in people with femoroacetabular impingement syndrome, but only in those with preexisting hip muscle weakness.
items.curatedReason: 这项对 RCT 基线数据的二次分析表明，髋关节肌肉力量与股骨髋臼撞击综合征（FAI）症状严重程度相关，但这仅限于那些已有髋关节肌肉无力的人群。这意味着在评估和干预时要区分患者的基础肌肉力量状况。
items.titleZh: 髋关节肌肉力量与股骨髋臼撞击综合征（FAI）患者症状严重程度相关，但仅限于已有髋关节肌肉无力者：一项随机对照试验基线数据的二次分析
items.summaryZh: 一项随机对照试验基线数据的二次分析发现，髋关节肌肉力量与股骨髋臼撞击综合征（FAI）患者症状严重程度相关，但仅限于那些已有髋关节肌肉无力的人群。
items.curatedReasonEn: This secondary analysis of RCT baseline data indicates that hip muscle strength is associated with symptom severity in FAI syndrome, but only in those with preexisting hip muscle weakness.
